  "brief_explanation": "The geometric mean return is calculated by taking the nth root of the product of (1 + each annual return in decimal form), then subtracting one, where n is the number of years. For this data, we calculate ((1+20/100) * (1-30/100) * (1+15/100))^(1/3)-1 = -4.76%"
}
